# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8 offset-md-2">
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">
                    <h3>Comments</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    @forelse($comments as $comment)
                        <div class="comment mb-3">
                            <h5>{{ $comment->user->name }}</h5>
                            <p>{!! $comment->content !!}</p>
                            <div class="text-muted">
                                <small>Posted on {{ $comment->created_at->format('M d, Y \a\t h:i A') }}</small>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <hr>
                    @empty
                        <p>No comments yet.</p>
                    @endforelse
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
